stem: The area A, in square inches, of a rectangular photo frame can be represented by the expression w(w + 7), where w is the width, in inches, of the frame. Which expression represents the length, in inches, of the frame?
rationale: Choice A is correct. The area of a rectangle equals length × width. Since width = w and area = w(w + 7), the length must be (w + 7). Choice B is the area. Choice C is the width. Choice D is the difference between length and width.
